message:
feat(web): Add native Next.js App Router sitemap and robots.txt generation

Sitemap Generation (src/app/sitemap.ts):
- Implement Next.js MetadataRoute.Sitemap for native sitemap generation
- Use getAllSitemapEntries() from @/lib/seo/sitemap for centralized URL list
- Set revalidate to 3600 seconds (1 hour) for ISR caching
- Replaces need for external sitemap generation tools during build
- Next.js automatically serves at /sitemap.xml with proper XML formatting

Robots.txt Generation (src/app/robots.ts):
- Implement Next.js MetadataRoute.Robots for programmatic robots.txt
- Allow all user agents to crawl public content (allow: "/")
- Disallow sensitive paths: /api/, /_next/, /admin/, /settings/
- Reference sitemap URL using SITE_URL constant for environment flexibility
- Next.js automatically serves at /robots.txt

Static Sitemap Update (public/sitemap.xml):
- Regenerated sitemap reflecting current site structure
- Includes all public pages: prompts, bundles, workflows, help docs
- Proper lastmod timestamps and priority values
- Serves as fallback and for next-sitemap post-build processing

This migration to native Next.js metadata routes improves:
- Build-time reliability (no external tool dependencies)
- Type safety (MetadataRoute types)
- Automatic cache invalidation via ISR
- Simpler deployment pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
